ext_name.description: Extension display name shown in chrome://extensions and the toolbar.

ext_description.message: Visualize the GitHub commit network (forks + main repo) in a dedicated tab. Manifest V3, no remote code, no telemetry.
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions (must be 132 chars or less).

action_default_title.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

popup_open_options.description: Popup link that opens the options page.

popup_launcher_title.description: Title of the graph launcher card in the popup.

popup_launcher_description.message: Open the commit graph for the current repository in a new tab.
popup_launcher_description.description: Description for the graph launcher card.

popup_launcher_open_detected.description: Button label for opening the detected repository.

popup_launcher_not_on_github.message: Not a GitHub repository page. Enter one below.
popup_launcher_not_on_github.description: Hint shown when the active tab is not a GitHub repository.

popup_launcher_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the manual owner/repo input.

popup_launcher_submit.description: Submit button label for the manual repo input.

popup_launcher_input_error.description: Validation error for invalid owner/repo input.

popup_recent_title.description: Heading for the recent repositories list in the popup.

popup_recent_aria_label.description: Accessible label for the recent repositories list.

options_saved.description: Status text shown after settings are saved.

options_mode_heading.description: Heading for the default graph mode section.

options_mode_description.message: The mode used when opening a new graph tab. You can switch temporarily in the graph header.
options_mode_description.description: Description of the default graph mode setting.

options_mode_legend.description: Fieldset legend for the default mode radio group.

options_mode_network_label.description: Radio label for the network (forks-inclusive) mode.

options_mode_network_desc.message: Show commits from forks in addition to the main repository.

options_mode_repo_only_label.description: Radio label for the repo-only mode.

options_mode_repo_only_desc.message: Show only commits from the main repository (fast and lightweight).

relative_now.description: Relative time: less than a minute ago.

graph_header_brand.description: Brand label in the graph page header.

graph_mode_repo_only.description: Mode toggle button: main repository only.

graph_refresh.description: Button label to refetch the current graph.

graph_loading.description: Loading indicator for the initial graph fetch.

graph_empty_commits.description: Empty state for a ready graph with zero commits.

graph_repo_prompt_prefix.description: Prefix of the prompt asking the user to enter a repo (rendered before the monospace owner/repo sample).

graph_repo_prompt_suffix.description: Suffix of the prompt asking the user to enter a repo (rendered after the monospace owner/repo sample).

graph_footer_load_error.description: Footer row error when loading older commits fails.

graph_footer_loading_more.description: Footer row text shown while older commits are being fetched.

graph_footer_will_load_more.description: Footer row text shown while waiting to load more.

graph_footer_retry.description: Retry button label in the graph footer row.

graph_repoform_label.description: Label for the repository input in RepoForm.

graph_repoform_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the repository input in RepoForm.

graph_repoform_error.description: Validation error for invalid input in RepoForm.

error_auth_heading.description: Heading shown for an authentication error.

error_notfound_heading.description: Heading shown when the repository is not found.

error_network_heading.description: Heading shown for a network error.

error_empty_heading.description: Heading shown when the repository has no commits yet.

error_shape_heading.message: GitHub may have changed its response format
error_shape_heading.description: Heading shown when the upstream response shape is unexpected.

error_http_heading.description: Heading shown for a generic HTTP error.

error_unknown_heading.description: Heading shown for an unknown error.

error_target_label.description: Label showing the owner/repo target of the failed request.

error_retry.description: Retry button label on the ErrorState card.

error_signin_link.description: Link label that opens GitHub's sign-in page.

commit_detail_select_prompt.message: Select a commit to see its details.
commit_detail_select_prompt.description: Placeholder shown in the commit detail pane when no commit is selected.

commit_detail_no_message.description: Placeholder shown when a commit has no subject/message.

commit_detail_action_open_github.description: Action: open the current commit on GitHub.

commit_detail_action_copy_sha.description: Action: copy the full commit SHA.

commit_detail_action_copy_short_sha.description: Action: copy the short commit SHA.

commit_detail_action_jump_parent.description: Action: select the parent commit in the graph.

commit_detail_parents_heading.description: Heading for the parents relation list.

commit_detail_parents_empty.description: Empty label for a root commit's parents list.

commit_detail_children_heading.description: Heading for the children relation list.

commit_detail_children_empty.description: Empty label when no children are visible in the current view.

commit_detail_changes_heading.description: Heading for the file changes section.

commit_detail_changes_loading.description: Loading indicator for the file changes section.

commit_detail_changes_no_files.description: Empty state for the file changes section.

commit_detail_changes_files_singular.description: Suffix after the file count when not truncated.

commit_detail_changes_files_truncated.description: Suffix after the file count when the list is truncated.

commit_detail_changes_truncated_note.message: Note: GitHub truncates files at 300; view the rest on GitHub.

commit_unknown_author.description: Fallback shown when a commit's author name is missing.
